violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean inside cook line 3 door cooler and freezer.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean utility carts. -Clean top of dishwasher.
Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in a clean, dry manner to protect from contamination. -Clean containers that store clean dishes.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Clean floor edges more thoroughly.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Proper storage, labeling, use (3 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Clean clothes, hair restraints, fingernail maint., jewelry, eating/drinking (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
